completion_summary: Enforced one shared RL observation contract at public-view reconstruction, checkpoint manifest validation, model deserialization, Dev evaluation, trace, and resource provenance; rejected legacy schemas and cross-platform JSON evidence drift; verified 83 RL tests, ruff, and mypy across 289 source modules.
notes: Does not touch SAC-owned training paths. Final manifests require checkpoint 0.3; periodic Dev sidecars require sidecar 0.2; both must bind the task observation hash.
scope: Make FrozenSB3Agent and Dev checkpoint evaluation reject legacy or observation-incompatible RL artifacts before policy deserialization; validate runtime public-view coordinate semantics and expose exact observation compatibility evidence.
